channel.title: GitHub SCSS Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of SCSS in GitHub

item.title: keyvanakbary/learning-notes
item.description: Notes on books I read, talks I watch, articles I study, and papers I love

item.title: cobiwave/simplefolio
item.description: ⚡️ A minimal portfolio template for Developers

item.title: just-the-docs/just-the-docs
item.description: A modern, high customizable, responsive Jekyll theme for documentation with built-in search.

item.title: RyanFitzgerald/devportfolio
item.description: A lightweight, customizable single-page personal portfolio website template built with JavaScript and Sass

item.title: Ileriayo/markdown-badges
item.description: Badges for your personal developer branding, profile, and projects.

item.title: Dorota1997/react-frontend-dev-portfolio
item.description: Easy to adapt and deploy React portfolio inspired with solutions found at GitHub.

item.title: vinceliuice/WhiteSur-gtk-theme
item.description: MacOS like theme for all gtk based desktops

item.title: jekyll/minima
item.description: Minima is a one-size-fits-all Jekyll theme for writers.

item.title: thingsym/hugo-theme-techdoc
item.description: The Techdoc is a Hugo Theme for technical documentation.

item.title: sivan/heti
item.description: 赫蹏（hètí）是专为中文内容展示设计的排版样式增强。它基于通行的中文排版规范而来，可以为网站的读者带来更好的文章阅读体验。

item.title: uswds/uswds
item.description: The U.S. Web Design System helps the federal government build fast, accessible, mobile-friendly websites.

item.title: nostalgic-css/NES.css
item.description: NES-style CSS Framework | ファミコン風CSSフレームワーク

item.title: creativetimofficial/soft-ui-dashboard
item.description: Soft UI Dashboard - Free and OpenSource Bootstrap 5 Dashboard

item.title: LeNPaul/Millennial
item.description: A minimalist Jekyll theme for running a blog or publication powered by Jekyll and GitHub Pages
